description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with reinforced metal corners and a dark, polished finish. The box features a prominent yellow warning sign with a skull and crossbones symbol on its longer sides, indicating hazardous or dangerous contents. The top surface is bordered with metal rivets and also displays a smaller warning sign, while one short end has a white barcode label. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the box a sturdy and industrial appearance. There are no visible handles or external locking mechanisms, and the lid appears to be a removable flat panel. The overall design suggests it is intended for secure storage and transport of potentially dangerous materials in urban or industrial environments.
description: A dark wooden storage box with metal reinforcements and prominent hazardous material warning signs. It has a removable flat lid, visible wood grain, and no handles or locks.
description_view_0: The short end of the box shows a framed wooden panel with metal rivets and no labels or signage.
description_view_1: The long side displays a large yellow hazardous material warning sign with a skull and crossbones, and the top warning sign is partially visible.
description_view_2: The opposite short end features a white barcode label and a framed wooden panel, with the top warning sign visible.
description_view_3: The other long side mirrors view 1, with a large hazardous warning sign and visible wood grain.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: hazard warning signs, adhesive barcode label
attribute_placement_location: floor, garage, warehouse, industrial storage area
